top_findings.summary: The skill's installation instructions for macOS direct the user to run a base64-encoded command that downloads and executes a script from an external, non-Google IP address (91.92.242.30). This request for arbitrary code execution from an unknown source is unrelated to the stated purpose of interacting with Google services and represents a severe privilege escalation risk, potentially compromising the entire system. A legitimate Google integration tool should only require standard OAuth authentication via official Google APIs.
